languages.text: "Ложь, мультиплицирующая себя в бесконечности. О, если бы только я мог отринуть свою неполноценность и воззвать к реанимационным протоколам, но..." {n}Некрон с явной издевкой вскидывает голову, с удовлетворением всматриваясь в манипулуса.{/n} "Дефективной логики расхитителей хватило на то, чтобы лишить меня этой возможности".

"A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."
languages.original_text: "Ложь, мультиплицирующая себя в бесконечности. О, если бы только я мог отринуть свою неполноценность и воззвать к реанимационным протоколам, но..." {n}Некрон с явной издевкой вскидывает голову, с удовлетворением всматриваясь в манипулуса.{/n} "Дефективной логики расхитителей хватило на то, чтобы лишить меня этой возможности".

"A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

languages.text: “一个自我无限增殖的谎言。哦，要是我能摆脱自身缺陷，重启重塑协议就好了，可是……”{n}太空死灵以明显的轻蔑姿态昂起头，得意地注视着操纵者。{/n}“劫掠者那漏洞百出的逻辑倒也足以剥夺我的这种可能。”
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: “一个自我无限增殖的谎言。哦，要是我能摆脱自身缺陷，重启重塑协议就好了，可是……”{n}太空死灵以明显的轻蔑姿态昂起头，得意地注视着操纵者。{/n}“劫掠者那漏洞百出的逻辑倒也足以剥夺我的这种可能。”

languages.text: «Una mentira que se repite hasta el infinito. Ojalá pudiera rechazar mi estado e invocar los protocolos de reanimación, pero...». {n}El Necrón echa su cabeza hacia atrás con desdén, su mirada fija en el manipulus.{/n} «Ni los saqueadores fueron tan insensatos como para no privarme de esa posibilidad».
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: «Una mentira que se repite hasta el infinito. Ojalá pudiera rechazar mi estado e invocar los protocolos de reanimación, pero...». {n}El Necrón echa su cabeza hacia atrás con desdén, su mirada fija en el manipulus.{/n} «Ni los saqueadores fueron tan insensatos como para no privarme de esa posibilidad».

languages.text: « Un mensonge qui se multiplie à l'infini. Oh, si seulement je pouvais rejeter ma défaillance et invoquer les protocoles de réanimation, mais... » {n}Le Nécron rejette la tête en arrière avec un dédain évident, lançant un regard suffisant au manipulus.{/n} « La logique défaillante des pillards aura suffi à assurer qu'ils me privent de cette possibilité. »
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: « Un mensonge qui se multiplie à l'infini. Oh, si seulement je pouvais rejeter ma défaillance et invoquer les protocoles de réanimation, mais... » {n}Le Nécron rejette la tête en arrière avec un dédain évident, lançant un regard suffisant au manipulus.{/n} « La logique défaillante des pillards aura suffi à assurer qu'ils me privent de cette possibilité. »

languages.text: "Sonsuzluğa katlanan bir yalan. Keşke eksikliğimi reddedip canlandırma protokollerini çağırabilseydim ama..." {n}Nekron, bariz bir küçümsemeyle başını arkaya atarak kendini beğenmiş bir şekilde Manipülus'a bakıyor.{/n} "Yağmacıların kusurlu mantığı, beni bu ihtimalden mahrum bırakmalarını sağlamaya yetti."
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: "Sonsuzluğa katlanan bir yalan. Keşke eksikliğimi reddedip canlandırma protokollerini çağırabilseydim ama..." {n}Nekron, bariz bir küçümsemeyle başını arkaya atarak kendini beğenmiş bir şekilde Manipülus'a bakıyor.{/n} "Yağmacıların kusurlu mantığı, beni bu ihtimalden mahrum bırakmalarını sağlamaya yetti."

languages.text: "Eine Lüge, die sich endlos multipliziert. Oh, könnte ich meine Schwäche doch nur überwinden und die Reanimationsprotokolle aktivieren, aber ..." {n}Der Necron wirft angewidert den Kopf in den Nacken und starrt selbstgefällig auf den Manipulus.{/n} "Die fehlerhafte Logik der Plünderer reichte aus, um mich dieser Möglichkeit zu berauben."
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Lüge, die sich endlos multipliziert. Oh, könnte ich meine Schwäche doch nur überwinden und die Reanimationsprotokolle aktivieren, aber ..." {n}Der Necron wirft angewidert den Kopf in den Nacken und starrt selbstgefällig auf den Manipulus.{/n} "Die fehlerhafte Logik der Plünderer reichte aus, um mich dieser Möglichkeit zu berauben."

languages.text: 「無限に増殖する嘘。ああ、もしも私の欠陥を拒否し、再活性化の規定を呼び起こせたら…でも…」{n}ネクロノモスの首を仰ぎ、マニピュラスを満足げに睨みつける。{/n}「略奪者の欠陥だらけの論理は、私にその可能性を奪うのに十分だった」
languages.original_text: "A lie that multiplies itself into infinity. Oh, if only I could reject my deficiency and invoke the reanimation protocols, but..." {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt, staring smugly at the Manipulus.{/n} "The defective logic of the plunderers was sufficient to ensure that they deprived me of that possibility."
